title: requests — cache keys
description: Cache keys this module owns. The registry cache is application-wide; per-user + per-tenant caches carry the tenant prefix via CachePrefixTenantHook. All keys use the redis store.

keys.description: Snapshotted AccessRequestableRegistry map from boot-time discovery. Shape: `{ resource_type: { class, permissions, display_name_source, default_grant_ttl_days } }`. Warmed on boot; refreshed by `config:cache` clear or `access-requests:cache-clear`.
keys.note: Un-prefixed — application-wide, identical across every tenant.

keys.description: Cached approver resolution result per (resource_type, resource_id). Populated by AccessRequestApproverResolver on first miss. Invalidated on template updates + role_delegations mutations. Short TTL because delegation state changes are common.
Cached count of pending access requests for the tenant admin dashboard header badge. Updated on submit / decide via listener invalidation.
Cached per-approver pending count for the approver's inbox badge. Invalidated on submit + decision events matching the approver.
